# Quickstart: Journal Metadata Directory (005)

**Generated by**: `/speckit.plan`  
**Date**: 2026-04-22  
**Branch**: `005-journal-metadata-dir`

---

## What Changed

The internal file layout of every journal directory is reorganized:

| Before | After |
|---|---|
| `<journal>/.mdjournal` (tracking file at root) | `<journal>/.mdjournal/` (hidden **directory**) |
| TOC structure embedded in `.journalrc` | `<journal>/.mdjournal/.journalindex` (tracking file) |
| — | `<journal>/.mdjournal/.journaltoc` (TOC structure file) |
| `.journalrc` with `structure` + `rootEntries` keys | `.journalrc` with only `journalName`, `ignoreFiles`, `extensions`, `file` |

---

## Implementation Checklist (for implementer)

### 1. `JournalSettings.cs` + `appsettings.json`

- [ ] Add `MetadataDirName` (default `".mdjournal"`)
- [ ] Add `TrackingFileName` (default `".journalindex"`)
- [ ] Add `TocStructureFileName` (default `".journaltoc"`)

### 2. Domain Models (`Infrastructure/Configuration/Models/`)

- [ ] Create `JournalTocStructure.cs` with `Structure` and `RootEntries`
- [ ] Remove `Structure` and `RootEntries` from `TableOfContents.cs`
- [ ] Update `JournalConfig.cs` if needed (keep `TableOfContents` reference)

### 3. `IFileSystem` + `FileSystem`

- [ ] Add `IsDirectory(string path)` to interface + implementation
- [ ] Add `CopyFile(string source, string dest)` to interface + implementation
- [ ] Update `TestFileSystem` with both new members

### 4. `IFileTracking` / `FileTracking`

- [ ] Replace `_indexFileName = $".{appName}"` with `settings.TrackingFileName`
- [ ] Update path construction: `Path.Combine(journalDir, metadataDirName, trackingFileName)`
- [ ] Update `GetCurrentMarkdownFiles` exclusion filter to use metadata dir path

### 5. `IJournalTocStructureRepository` / `JournalTocStructureRepository` (new)

- [ ] Create `Infrastructure/Configuration/IJournalTocStructureRepository.cs`
- [ ] Create `Infrastructure/Configuration/JournalTocStructureRepository.cs`
- [ ] Register in `Program.cs`

### 6. `IAddTocService` / `AddTocService` (new)

- [ ] Create `Services/AddToc/IAddTocService.cs`
- [ ] Create `Services/AddToc/AddTocService.cs` — wraps two-file creation in `FileTransactionScope`
- [ ] Register in `Program.cs`

### 7. `AddTableOfContentsCommand` — add flags

- [ ] Add `--structure-only` flag to command settings
- [ ] Add `--md-only` flag to command settings
- [ ] Delegate to `IAddTocService.Execute(journalDir, structureOnly, mdOnly)`
- [ ] On `AlreadyExists` result: warn via `IAnsiConsole` and return exit code 1

### 8. `IJournalValidator` / `JournalValidator` (new)

- [ ] Create `IJournalValidator.cs` + `JournalValidator.cs`
- [ ] Implement `ValidateMetadataDirectory`: check for `.mdjournal/` directory, `.journalindex`, `.journaltoc`
- [ ] Register in `Program.cs`
- [ ] Call from `JournalCommand<TSettings>` base class before business logic; surface error via `IAnsiConsole` + exit code 1

### 9. `IJournalConfiguration` / `JournalConfiguration`

- [ ] `Create()` — write `.journalrc` without `structure`/`rootEntries`
- [ ] `Update()` — no longer reads/writes structure fields

### 10. `NewJournalService` + `InitJournalService`

- [ ] Create metadata directory during journal creation/init
- [ ] Write `.journalindex` into metadata directory
- [ ] Write `.journaltoc` into metadata directory (initially empty structure)
- [ ] Write `.journalrc` without structure

### 11. All services that read TOC structure

- [ ] `JournalConfigGenerator` — load structure from `IJournalTocStructureRepository` instead of `JournalConfig.TableOfContents.Structure`
- [ ] `TableOfContentsService` — write structure back to `IJournalTocStructureRepository`
- [ ] `JournalUpdateService` — same

### 12. Tests

- [ ] Update `TestFileSystem` with `IsDirectory`
- [ ] Add `JournalTocStructureRepositoryTests`
- [ ] Add `AddTocServiceTests` (unit + integration for each flag combination)
- [ ] Add `JournalValidatorTests` (missing dir, missing files, fully valid)
- [ ] Update all existing integration tests that create/inspect journals
- [ ] Update `QuickstartValidationTests` for new layout
- [ ] No test deleted solely to avoid updating (SC-001)

### 13. Documentation

- [ ] Update `docs/ARCHITECTURE.md` directory tree + descriptions
- [ ] Regenerate architecture diagram PNG from `.drawio` source
- [ ] Update `README.md` journal layout section
- [ ] Update `docs/DEVELOPMENT.md`

### 14. Constitution (`/.specify/memory/constitution.md`)

- [ ] Update "Serialization" row in Technology Stack Constraints table:
  - **Before**: `System.Text.Json for .journalrc and .mdjournal`
  - **After**: `System.Text.Json for .journalrc, .journalindex, and .journaltoc (inside .mdjournal/ metadata directory)`
- [ ] Bump version: `1.0.0` → `1.0.1` (PATCH — factual correction)
- [ ] Update "Last Amended" date

---

## Key Path Helpers (reference)

```csharp
// Metadata directory absolute path
var metaDir = Path.Combine(journalDir, _settings.MetadataDirName);

// Tracking file absolute path
var trackingPath = Path.Combine(metaDir, _settings.TrackingFileName);

// TOC structure file absolute path
var tocStructPath = Path.Combine(metaDir, _settings.TocStructureFileName);

// Detect old layout
bool isOldLayout = _fileSystem.FileExists(Path.Combine(journalDir, _settings.MetadataDirName))
                   && !_fileSystem.IsDirectory(Path.Combine(journalDir, _settings.MetadataDirName));
```

---

## Running Tests After Implementation

```bash
cd /Users/collinrobison/Repos/markdown-journal-cli
dotnet build
dotnet test
```

All tests must pass. No `--filter` workarounds to hide failures.
